test_framework: pytest with conftest.py fixtures, tmp_path based, 894 tests currently passing
build_command: pip install -e . (or just run directly since it's script-based)
verification_instructions: Run pytest with coverage, all tests must pass and coverage >= 90%
setup_instructions: pip install pyyaml fastapi uvicorn websockets httpx (all already installed)
environment_constraints: FastAPI, uvicorn, websockets, httpx all installed. No Docker daemon needed. Python 3.12 available.
contribution_requirements: Tests must pass, coverage >= 90%, follow existing patterns with tmp_path fixtures
key_patterns: State managed via YAML files, JSONL for append-only logs, tmp_path fixtures for isolation, GraphExecutor for workflow, StateManager for persistence, FeedbackLoop ties reflector to evolution engine, EvolutionMetrics tracks per-node performance
directory_structure: kernel/ = core logic (graph, evolution, state), memory/ = persistent state (JSONL, YAML), knowledge/ = rules+patterns, skills/ = skill definitions, tests/ = pytest tests
